{{Quote|We could take over Mos Eisley Spaceport.|Dunhausen to the [[Central Committee of Grand Moffs]]|<ref name="The Glove of Darth Vader">''[[The Glove of Darth Vader]]''</ref>}}
'''Dunhausen''' was a high-ranking [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] officer and member of the [[Central Committee of Grand Moffs]]. He was [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Bertroff Hissa]]'s most trusted Grand Moff.

==Biography==
At a secret conference with the self-proclaimed heir to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], [[Trioculus]], Dunhausen recommended that a new Imperial city-seat should be established on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. The recommendation was lacking any strategic value and was more closely tied with his desire to take control of the [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]]. Trioculus rejected his recommendation.

==Personality and traits==
Dunhausen was predominantly known for two things; his scheming nature, and for always wearing a pair of [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]]-shaped earrings.

He owned the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[3B6-RA-7]].
